# Upstream provenance

- Repository: https://github.com/aask1357/fastenhancer
- Commit: `49ab55a57e3a064d94c6412cd0f0a383a55ca0f8`
- Release tag: `ckpt-vd-v1.0.0`
- Original paths: `models/fastenhancer/default/model.py`,
  `functional/audio_modules.py`, and `configs/fastenhancer/b.yaml`
- Retrieved: 2026-07-21

Only the streaming inference architecture and audio transforms are included.
Training, datasets, losses, optimizers, and metrics are deliberately omitted.
